title: Instant Analytics Dashboard Factory
description: Pick a curated sample dataset, watch Claude profile it via streaming animation, get a fully designed interactive dashboard. Two modes: ad-hoc analysis for business users, hi-fi wireframes for BI engineers.

resumeBullet.text: Architected an AI-powered dashboard factory on Next.js + Vercel — applies a unified design-token system across 6 business domains with streaming AI profiling, automatic KPI / chart recommendation, and Figma-exportable hi-fi wireframes. Reduces ad-hoc dashboard turnaround from days to minutes.

portfolioCard.problem: Dashboard creation follows a slow cycle: stakeholder shares raw data, BI engineer profiles it manually, designs wireframe in Figma, gets alignment, then builds in Tableau or Power BI. Ad-hoc requests get deprioritised. Power users spend days wireframing before stakeholder discovery sessions.
portfolioCard.approach: An AI-powered factory with two modes. (1) Ad-hoc mode for business users: pick a sample dataset, AI profiles columns and recommends KPIs / charts via streaming explanation, fully designed interactive dashboard renders with filters and PDF export. (2) Wireframe mode for BI engineers: pick a layout template, get a clickable hi-fi mockup, export to Figma for stakeholder discovery.
portfolioCard.impact: Ad-hoc dashboard turnaround drops from days to minutes. BI engineers save 3-4 days of wireframing per project. The unified design system means every output looks like it came from a professional BI team.
